title: Booming Conch
description: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Booming Conch only triggers on the first turn (round 1) of Elite combats. The extra card draw is applied when the initial hand is drawn at the start of combat.
